title: Login page not loading
description: Users are unable to access the login page after deployment.

title: Profile image upload issue
description: Profile images are not being saved in the database.

title: Dashboard stats mismatch
description: Statistics are not updating in real-time.

title: Forgot password email not sent
description: Users are not receiving password reset emails.

title: Mobile menu not responsive
description: Navigation menu breaks on smaller devices.

title: API response delay
description: Server response time is higher than expected.

title: Search feature not working
description: Search returns empty results even for valid queries.

title: User role permission bug
description: Admin role cannot update user permissions.

title: Data export CSV broken
description: CSV file downloads empty despite available data.

title: UI alignment issue
description: Buttons are misaligned on the settings page.

title: Session timeout too short
description: Users are logged out after 5 minutes of inactivity.

title: Dark mode toggle not saving
description: Theme preference resets after page refresh.

title: File upload size limit error
description: System throws error for files under allowed size.
